Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: testuser
2. Enter password: testpassword
3. Click login button

Title: Invalid Username
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: wronguser
2. Enter password: testpassword
3. Click login button

Title: Invalid Password
Preconditions: User enters valid username but invalid password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: testuser
2. Enter password: wrongpassword
3. Click login button

Title: Retry After Failure
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: wronguser
2. Enter password: wrongpassword
3. Click login button
4. Click retry button
5. Enter username: testuser
6. Enter password: testpassword
7. Click login button
